title: DANCOLOR Interactive Cat Toys Ball with Bell&Feathers 3Pack for Indoor Cats Adult Kittens Playing Chewing Teeth Cleaning Hunting, Jingle Bell in Assorted Colors Bouncy Balls, Gift for Cat Owner
features: 【Funny cat toys】 The bouncy balls are with bright assorted colors, jingle bell built-in and with nature feathers, funny and practical, can catch your cat's attention immediately, its bounce, rolling and crisp sound can engage and stimulate indoor cats kittens full of curiosity. Hollow lattice design can help cleaning cat tooth by chewing.

【Safe material】These large lattice balls are made by soft silicone, for kitten to chew and easy to grab. No burrs, don't worry to heart their tender gums or paw. No catnip infused, for all-life-stage cats entertainment from kitten to adult cat. More durable than form ball and crinkle balls, can extend playtime experience for your feline companion for several month.

【Shared Playtime】Throwing the ball and letting your playful cats to chase, like a fetch game, these interactive pet toys strengthen your connection with your cat through fun and engaging activities, more training and exercise can reduce boredom and curbing unwanted behaviors. You can even hang it on a cat teaser wand as a replacement. Enjoy the playtime with your cat baby NOW!

【Ideal Gift Choice For Cat Lovers】The interactive cat ball toy is a good ideal gift for your cat or your friend as a cat owner, it can help the cats focus their energy on playing, minimizing furniture damage. Red+Green match Christmas style or any special days.

【Notes】Not all cats are interested in this ball toy with feather and jingle bell, especially the emasculated cat adult.If your cat is not interested, please contact us. We will continue to test and improve cat toys to give cats the most enjoyable experience.
description: Product description Name: Cat InteractiveToys-Ball Toy, Feather Toy, Jingle Bell Toy 3 in 1 Brand: DANCOLOR Color: Red*1, Green*1, Blue*1 Material:Soft Rubber Ball, Metal Jingle Bell &Nature Feather Size: 5cm(2inch) diameter for ball, 15-20cm length for feather Suitable for Small Medium Large Cats Playing Chasing Chewing How to play it 1.bouncy 2.rolling 3.jingle bell singing 4.replacing the toys on the cat teaser wand Looking forward to you and your cat developing more ways to play with this cat ball toy! Directions Not all cats are interested in this ball toy with feather and bell, especially the emasculated cat adult.If your cat is not interested, please contact us
